scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres scylladb redis minio
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres scylladb redis minio
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && pnpm prisma db seed
scripts.db:scylla:reset: docker exec sotto_scylla cqlsh -e "DROP KEYSPACE IF EXISTS sotto;"
scripts.dev:hybrid: pnpm infra:up && echo 'Infrastruktur aktif. Silakan jalankan backend:dev dan frontend:dev di terminal terpisah.'
